composers.name: Fromental Halévy
composers.onRequestNote: Score, vocal score and parts available on request

entries.title: La Reine de Chypre — Opéra en cinq actes (1841). Score, vocal score and parts available on request.
Two overtures by Halévy arranged for string quartet by Richard Wagner (1841/42): La Reine de Chypre and Le Guitarrero. Available on request.
Catarina Cornaro — Oper in vier Akten (1841). Score, vocal score and parts available on request.
Die sizilianische Vesper / Il vespro siciliano — Große Oper mit Tanz in vier Akten (1844). Score, vocal score and parts available on request.
Zum Großadmiral — Komische Oper in drei Akten (1847). Score, vocal score and parts available on request.
Alimelek — Komische Oper in zwei Akten (1813/1814). Score, vocal score and parts available on request.
Stella di Napoli — Dramma lirico in tre parti (1845). Score and parts of the overture available on request. Score, vocal score and parts of the complete opera in preparation.
